summary: Complete implementation plan for deploying NetBird VPN on Azure VM (Ubuntu 22.04) at netbirdtest.fincart.com. Based on thorough research of the latest NetBird documentation, the plan uses the modern combined-container architecture (v0.65.0+) with embedded IdP, official getting-started.sh script with Nginx option, and post-deployment Azure AD integration via Dashboard UI. Covers 7 phases: prerequisites/cleanup, script execution, Nginx config, service startup, admin setup, Azure AD integration, and client onboarding. Includes 3 open questions about port conflicts, SSL paths, and UDP port availability.
